response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment at 00:00-01:23 and 03:27-04:22. 2. Identified the song 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown' by EGOIST from the screen text. 3. Searched for the lyrics of the song 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown EGOIST lyrics'. 4. Located the full Japanese lyrics and translated them into English. 5. Mapped the scenes (singing vs. talking) for the video and created the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two VTubers, Raora and Delyko, performing a song and having a conversation. The song performed is 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown' by EGOIST.

scenes.description: Raora and Delyko are performing 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown'. The stage is lit with red lights, and there are visual effects resembling a digital concert.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界は終わりを告げようとしてる
誰にももう止められはしない――始まる
崩壊の交響曲が鳴り響いて
降る雨はまるで涙の音色
教えて
支配し支配され人達は
いつかその心に憎しみを
そして愛することを思い出せず
争うの？
この歌が聴こえてる
生命ある全ての者よ
真実はあなたの胸の中にある
嵐の海を行く時も
決して臆することのない強さを
くれるから
けれども進むほど風は強く
希望の灯はやがて消えていく
"明かりをよこせ"と奪い合い
果てに人は殺し合う
涙などとうに枯れて
気付いて
その目は互いを認めるため
その声は想いを伝えるため
その手は大事な人と繋ぐためにある
この歌が聴こえてる
世界中の寄る辺なき者よ
希望はあなたの胸の中にある
燃え盛る焔の中でも
決して傷つくことのない強さを
くれるから
その手で守ろうとしたものは
愛する者だったのだろうか
紅く染まったその手を眺めて
やっと自らがしてきた愚かさを
過ちと認めるその罪を
とめどなくあふれるその涙を知る
この歌が聴こえてる
生命ある全ての者よ
真実はあなたの胸の中にある
嵐の海は静まった
失ったものは数えきれなくとも
この歌が聴こえてる
世界中の寄る辺なき者よ
希望はあなたの胸の中にある
悲しみの夜を越える時
必ずあなたは生きていく強さを
持てるから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The world is about to announce its end
No one can stop it anymore—it begins
The symphony of collapse resonates
The falling rain sounds just like the tone of tears
Tell me
People, ruling and being ruled
Someday, hatred in their hearts
And unable to remember how to love
They fight?
This song is being heard
To all those who are alive
The truth lies within your heart
Even when going through stormy seas
Because it gives you the strength
That will never be daunted
However, the more you advance, the stronger the wind
The lamp of hope will eventually go out
"Give me the light," they snatch from each other
In the end, people kill each other
Tears have long since dried up
Realize it
Those eyes are to recognize each other
That voice is to convey your feelings
Those hands are to hold important people
This song is being heard
To all the helpless people in the world
Hope lies within your heart
Even in the blazing flames
Because it gives you the strength
That will never be hurt
Was the thing you tried to protect with those hands
The person you loved?
Looking at those hands dyed red
Finally, recognizing the foolishness you have done yourself
Recognizing that sin as a mistake
Knowing the tears that overflow endlessly
This song is being heard
To all those who are alive
The truth lies within your heart
The stormy sea has calmed down
Even if the things lost are countless
This song is being heard
To all the helpless people in the world
Hope lies within your heart
When you overcome the night of sadness
You will surely have the strength
To live on

scenes.description: A transition pause between the performance and the dialogue segment.
Raora and Delyko engage in a dialogue, discussing the performance and their relationship.
Raora and Delyko resume their performance of 'The Everlasting Guilty Crown', dancing and singing on stage.

scenes.description: The video concludes with a dialogue between Raora and Delyko.
